en: Assemble piles of characters that belong to the same Touhou game
es: Arma conjuntos de personajes que pertenecen al mismo juego de Touhou

en: By illusorybread for Touhou Station Game Jam 2026. Uses Touhou Game Jam Pixel Character Pack by tea_basira. Sky Ruins arrangement by dobuusagi from dBu music. Sound effects from SoundEffect Lab and Kenney. Additional graphics by Kenney
es: Por illusorybread para Touhou Station Game Jam 2026. Touhou Game Jam Pixel Character Pack hecho por tea_basira. Arreglo de Sky Ruins hecho for dobuusagi de dBu music. Efectos de sonido de SoundEffect Lab y Kenney. Gráficos adicionales por Kenney
